title: Fields, patterns and information: R.L. Brahmachary's contributions during the infancy of molecular embryology.
journal_full: The International journal of developmental biology
abstract: The contribution of Professor Ratan Lal Brahmachary's research during the early years of molecular embryology, its theoretical underpinnings, and its connection with those of other contemporary research efforts, are traced in this article as a part of the history of developmental biology research in India.
